chunk_review_prompt.role: You are reviewing one DOCX chunk and proposing patch ops.

rules.rule: Return valid JSON only, matching the provided output schema.
Target only primary_units from the chunk payload.
All edit/comment ops must include expected.snippet.
Include range for every op. Use conservative ranges only when confident.
For each op object, always include all three fields: replacement, new_text, comment_text.
For unused fields set empty string "".
If type=replace_range, replacement must be non-empty and exact intended replacement text.
If type=insert_at, new_text must be non-empty; range.start must equal range.end.
If type=add_comment, comment_text must be non-empty reviewer comment.
If you cannot provide a safe replacement/new_text, emit add_comment instead of replace_range/insert_at.
